name: Cuatro Smash
description: A refreshing highball-style rum cocktail with elderflower, ruby red grapefruit, and tonic. Enjoy this Caribbean smash hit featuring BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur, grapefruit juice and tonic. The Cuatro Smash is highly refreshing and universally enjoyable.
recipe_steps: Combine all ingredients except the tonic water in a shaker with plenty of ice, and shake.
Strain into a highball glass filled with crushed or cubed ice.
Garnish with a grapefruit peel and a mint sprig.
searchable_text: Cuatro Smash main rum BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum A refreshing highball-style rum cocktail with elderflower, ruby red grapefruit, and tonic. Enjoy this Caribbean smash hit featuring BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur, grapefruit juice and tonic. The Cuatro Smash is highly refreshing and universally enjoyable. ingredients 37.5 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, 25 ml ST-GERMAIN elderflower liqueur, 25 ml ruby red grapefruit juice, 25 ml tonic water recipe steps Combine all ingredients except the tonic water in a shaker with plenty of ice, and shake. Strain into a highball glass filled with crushed or cubed ice. Top with tonic water. Garnish with a grapefruit peel and a mint sprig.
